---
pagetitle: "Projects â€” Daniel Regalado Cardoso"
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
toc: false
css: styles.css
---

::: {.section-container}

## Capstone Projects {.section-title}

::: {.section-subtitle}
Industry partnerships.
:::

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid building >}} AI for Equitable Public Transportation {#transit}

::: {.project-org-label}
Deloitte Â· University of Miami
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
Jan 2026 â€“ Present
:::

Building predictive models integrating Census ACS, GTFS, and ArcGIS data to identify transit equity gaps in Miami-Dade County. Sprint-based development with GitHub issue tracking, SHAP-based interpretability, simulation models, and an interactive dashboard for equity-driven policy recommendations.

`Python` `SHAP` `GTFS` `ArcGIS` `Census ACS`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/CapstoneProject-AI-for-Equitable-Transportation){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} Â· [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/miami-transit-equity){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid robot >}} AI Scheduling Assistant {#bascom-palmer}

::: {.project-org-label}
UHealth Bascom Palmer Eye Institute Â· University of Miami
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
Sep 2025 â€“ Present
:::

Prototyped a multi-agent LLM chatbot with LangGraph, LangChain, and GPT-4 Turbo â€” RAG over ChromaDB, deterministic safety gates, confidence scoring, and LangSmith monitoring â€” then shipped the production solution on Microsoft Copilot Studio integrated with UHealth's scheduling systems for 100+ providers.

`Copilot Studio` `LangGraph` `LangChain` `GPT-4` `RAG` `ChromaDB`
:::

:::

:::

<hr class="divider">

::: {.section-container}

## Featured Projects {.section-title}

::: {.section-subtitle}
Things I've built.
:::

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid database >}} Multi-Model SQL Agent with LLMOps {#sql-agent}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Fine-Tuning & LLMOps
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Multi-model SQL agent orchestrating three specialized fine-tuned LLMs: Qwen 2.5 Coder 7B for SQL generation, Phi-3 Mini 3.8B for chart reasoning (knowledge-distilled), and DeepSeek Coder 1.3B for SVG rendering. Schema RAG over ChromaDB, DuckDB execution, Plotly fallback, and three public training datasets on the HuggingFace Hub.

`Qwen 2.5 Coder` `Phi-3` `DeepSeek` `Unsloth` `ChromaDB` `DuckDB` `LLMOps`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/sql-agent-llmops){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid microchip >}} MoE Backward Optimization (moesloth) {#moesloth}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Triton Kernels, Unsloth-inspired
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Research project applying Unsloth's hand-derived-backward + Triton-fusion methodology to Mixture-of-Experts. Targets sparse O(k) router backward, fused dispatch/combine with expert GEMMs, and LoRA-on-MoE selective grad accumulation. Validation against Megablocks, ScatterMoE, and DeepSeek-MoE on OLMoE and Mixtral.

`Triton` `PyTorch` `Mixture-of-Experts` `Unsloth` `Kernel Fusion`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/moesloth){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid heart-pulse >}} HDL Cholesterol Prediction {#hdl}

::: {.project-org-label}
ASA South Florida Data Challenge â€” Distinguished Achievement (Top 10%)
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Developed a CatBoost model on NHANES survey data achieving RÂ˛ = 0.75 for predicting HDL cholesterol levels. Domain-guided feature engineering with SHAP analysis identified gender and waist circumference as top predictors. Presented at FIU Winner Showcase. Collaboration with Miguel Rocha.

`CatBoost` `SHAP` `NHANES` `Feature Engineering`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/hdl-cholesterol-prediction){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid chart-line >}} DiagBoostTS {#diagboost}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Python Library
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2025 â€“ Present
:::

Iterative diagnostic boosting for time series forecasting. A systematic EDA â†’ Stationarity â†’ Decomposition â†’ Features â†’ Split â†’ Model â†’ Evaluate pipeline with editorial/minimal visual theme and modular architecture.

`Python` `Time Series` `XGBoost` `SARIMA` `Library Design`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/diagboost-ts){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid chart-bar >}} Product Sales Forecasting {#sales-forecasting}

::: {.project-org-label}
MSBA @ University of Miami
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

End-to-end time series forecasting of product sales â€” exploratory data analysis, 14 model families, and cross-validated model selection for optimal forecasting performance.

`Python` `Time Series` `Cross-Validation` `EDA`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/product-sales-forecasting){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid star >}} Yelp Recommendation & Churn Prediction {#yelp}

::: {.project-org-label}
MAS 651 â€” Deep Learning Final Project
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Recommendation system and churn prediction model for Tampa Bay businesses using Yelp data. Deep learning approaches for user behavior modeling and business analytics.

`Deep Learning` `Recommendation Systems` `Churn` `NLP`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/MAS651-Final-Project){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid truck >}} CanDi Supply Chain Network Design {#candi}

::: {.project-org-label}
MGT 642 â€” Supply Chain Analytics Final Project
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Supply chain network design and optimization for CanDi, applying analytical models for facility location, capacity planning, and logistics optimization.

`Supply Chain` `Optimization` `Network Design` `Analytics`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/CanDi-Supply-Chain-Design){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid file-lines >}} ATS Resume Optimizer {#ats-optimizer}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Live on HuggingFace Spaces
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Full-stack AI tool that analyzes resumes against job descriptions using a hybrid ML scoring system: 60% ATS keyword match (Llama 3.1-70B) + 40% semantic similarity (Sentence-Transformers). Generates an optimized, ATS-tailored resume with downloadable PDF.

`Llama 3.1-70B` `Sentence-Transformers` `Gradio` `HuggingFace` `NLP`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/ats-resume-optimizer){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} Â· [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/ats-resume-optimizer){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid language >}} MayaVoice LLM {#mayavoice}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Generative AI for Indigenous Languages
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Multilingual GenAI application for translation and conversation in Guatemalan Mayan languages. Bridges the gap between low-resource indigenous languages and modern AI through fine-tuned LLMs, preserving cultural heritage through technology.

`LLMs` `NLP` `Low-Resource Languages` `HuggingFace` `Gradio`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/mayavoice-llm){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} Â· [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/mayavoice){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid calculator >}} Maya Encoding {#maya-encoding}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Open-Source Python Library
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

Maya-inspired vigesimal numerical encodings for machine learning. Scikit-learn compatible transformers that convert numerical features into base-20 representations inspired by the ancient Maya numeral system, offering a novel feature engineering approach.

`Python` `scikit-learn` `Feature Engineering` `Library Design`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/maya-encoding){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} Â· [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/maya-encoding-demo){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid atom >}} CounterFlow Neural Network {#counterflow}

::: {.project-org-label}
Personal Project â€” Novel Architecture
:::
::: {.project-date-label}
2026
:::

A novel neural network architecture inspired by counter-current flow in chemical engineering unit operations. Applies principles of heat and mass transfer to information flow in deep learning, creating bidirectional feature exchange between parallel network streams.

`PyTorch` `Deep Learning` `Neural Architecture` `Chemical Engineering`

[{{< fa brands github >}} View Repository](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami/counterflow-nn){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"} Â· [{{< fa solid arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Live Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/counterflow-nn){target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--accent-blue);"}
:::

:::

:::

<hr class="divider">

::: {.section-container}

## Open-Source ML Engineering {.section-title}

::: {.section-subtitle}
End-to-end: I curate the data, fine-tune the models, and ship them publicly â€” all under Apache 2.0 on the Hugging Face Hub.
:::

::: {.hf-stats-row}

::: {.hf-stat}
::: {.hf-stat-num}
5
:::
::: {.hf-stat-label}
fine-tuned LoRA models
:::
:::

::: {.hf-stat}
::: {.hf-stat-num}
4
:::
::: {.hf-stat-label}
curated training datasets
:::
:::

::: {.hf-stat}
::: {.hf-stat-num}
220K+
:::
::: {.hf-stat-label}
training rows released
:::
:::

::: {.hf-stat}
::: {.hf-stat-num}
3
:::
::: {.hf-stat-label}
base-model families
:::
:::

:::

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid robot >}} Fine-Tuned Models

::: {.project-org-label}
LoRA adapters across Llama 3.1, Phi-3, and DeepSeek Coder â€” fine-tuned with Unsloth
:::

**Low-resource NLP**

- [đź¤— mayavoice-llama3.1-8b-lora-v2](https://huggingface.co/DanielRegaladoCardoso/mayavoice-llama3.1-8b-lora-v2){target="_blank"} â€” Llama 3.1 8B adapter for Guatemalan Mayan-language translation. Tagged for low-resource indigenous NLP; powers the [MayaVoice Space](https://huggingface.co/spaces/DanielRegaladoCardoso/mayavoice){target="_blank"}.
- [đź¤— mayavoice-llama3.1-8b-lora](https://huggingface.co/DanielRegaladoCardoso/mayavoice-llama3.1-8b-lora){target="_blank"} â€” v1 baseline release.

**Multi-model SQL agent stack**

- [đź¤— chart-reasoner-phi3-mini-lora](https://huggingface.co/DanielRegaladoCardoso/chart-reasoner-phi3-mini-lora){target="_blank"} â€” Phi-3 Mini 3.8B fine-tuned to pick the right chart type for a given query + schema. Knowledge-distilled.
- [đź¤— chart-reasoner-phi3-mini-adapter-only](https://huggingface.co/DanielRegaladoCardoso/chart-reasoner-phi3-mini-adapter-only){target="_blank"} â€” lightweight adapter-only release (pair with base model).
- [đź¤— svg-renderer-deepseek-coder-1.3b-lora](https://huggingface.co/DanielRegaladoCardoso/svg-renderer-deepseek-coder-1.3b-lora){target="_blank"} â€” DeepSeek Coder 1.3B fine-tuned to render structured data as inline SVG charts.

`Unsloth` `LoRA / PEFT` `Llama 3.1 8B` `Phi-3 Mini` `DeepSeek Coder 1.3B`
:::

::: {.project-card}
### {{< fa solid database >}} Curated Datasets

::: {.project-org-label}
Training corpora I built and released â€” 220K+ rows, Parquet, Apache 2.0
:::

**Text-to-SQL (bilingual EN / ZH)**

- [đź¤— text-to-sql-mix-v2](https://huggingface.co/datasets/DanielRegaladoCardoso/text-to-sql-mix-v2){target="_blank"} â€” 100K+ rows, adds Chinese coverage and task-ID metadata for multilingual SQL-generation fine-tuning.
- [đź¤— text-to-sql-mix-v1](https://huggingface.co/datasets/DanielRegaladoCardoso/text-to-sql-mix-v1){target="_blank"} â€” 100K+ rows, English baseline. Prior version used for SQL-generator LoRA training.

**Chart reasoning & rendering**

- [đź¤— chart-reasoning-mix-v1](https://huggingface.co/datasets/DanielRegaladoCardoso/chart-reasoning-mix-v1){target="_blank"} â€” 10Kâ€“100K examples mapping natural-language queries + schemas to chart-type decisions. Used to distill the Phi-3 chart reasoner.
- [đź¤— svg-chart-render-v1](https://huggingface.co/datasets/DanielRegaladoCardoso/svg-chart-render-v1){target="_blank"} â€” 10Kâ€“100K structured-data â†’ SVG rendering pairs. Training signal for the DeepSeek SVG renderer.

`Parquet` `Apache 2.0` `Multilingual EN/ZH` `Text-to-SQL` `Chart Reasoning`
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-secondary);"}
Everything above plugs into the [SQL Agent with LLMOps](#sql-agent) and [MayaVoice](#mayavoice) projects â€” the pipelines ship as reproducible public artifacts.
:::

:::


::: {.section-container}

::: {.connect-section}

::: {.connect-heading}
Interested in collaborating?
:::

I'm always open to discussing new projects and opportunities.

::: {.connect-links}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-regalado-cardoso-81551b16b){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/DanielRegaladoUMiami){.btn .btn-outline-dark .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[đź¤— Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/DanielRegaladoCardoso){.btn .btn-outline-warning .btn-lg target="_blank"}
[{{< fa solid envelope >}} Email](mailto:dxr1491@miami.edu){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg target="_blank"}
:::

:::

:::
